overview.title: Prepare and submit the capture draft
overview.description: The first three screens collect the payload in browser memory. The review step now submits that payload to the backend capture job API.
overview.interviewProgress: {{count}} messages so far — continue the conversation.
overview.interviewStart: Claude will guide you through 5 questions to understand who you are.
overview.voiceSoon: Coming soon — voice sample and tone capture.
overview.imageSoon: Coming soon — reference image and visual direction.

interview.title: Interview
interview.description: Claude will guide you through 5 questions to understand who you are. Answer naturally — there are no wrong answers.
interview.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

review.title: Review draft package
review.description: This is the payload that will be sent to the backend capture job API. File uploads are still metadata-only, but the review step is now the real submission gate.
review.gateDescription: Submitting this draft creates a persisted capture job. The next backend phase can attach real file upload handling and async processing on top of the same payload shape.

submissions.title: Review saved capture jobs
submissions.description: Each submission is a persisted capture package. This list view is intentionally card-based so the same card pattern can be reused later for admin review screens.
submissions.emptyDescription: Once the review step is submitted, the backend stores a capture job and it will appear here.

detail.submittedMessage: Capture job {{id}} was created and is now persisted.
detail.description: This detail view is designed to be reusable for later admin review. The same payload summary can be shown whether the viewer is the owner or an administrator.
detail.actionsDescription: Delete removes the persisted capture job. Use this detail screen as the single action surface for both current-user and future admin review flows.

voice.title: Voice intent
voice.description: Voice capture will be available in a future update.
voice.comingSoonText: Voice sample upload and tone configuration will be added after the interview MVP is complete.

image.title: Visual references
image.description: Image capture will be available in a future update.
image.comingSoonText: Reference image upload and visual direction notes will be added after the interview MVP is complete.

layout.heading: Answer 5 questions and let Claude build your persona draft.
layout.subheading: Complete the AI interview, then review and submit. Voice and image capture will be added in a future update.
layout.progressDescription: Complete the interview to unlock the review and submission step.
layout.stepMapDescription: Move step by step or jump back to revise any section.
